videos.title: Back in 2004, email seemed like a solved problem. But an engineer at Google had different ideas...

videos.description: Back in 2004, email seemed like a solved problem. But an engineer at Google had different ideas...here, Ania tells you about how Gmail was created.

videos.title: The first webcam was invented to watch...coffee?
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: The first webcam was invented to watch...coffee? Ania explains the power of laziness and how it led to this powerful little piece of tech.

videos.title: Can you help a company solve a problem - and will they let you in and learn from you?
videos.author: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Can you help a company solve a problem - and will they let you in and learn from you? Landon discusses how you can determine if you can actually help someone in his discussion with Quincy on the freeCodeCamp podcast.
